statement: In every magma, Equation 3133 (`x = (((y * x) * z) * z) * w`) implies Equation 2744 (`x = ((y * y) * (y * x)) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0576
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op (op y x) z) z) w)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y y) (op y x)) y)
